### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSSyncFile HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Cookie: REDACTED
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.11
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Streaming: true
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Fs-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/worker.py",
  "3:VARINT": 4,
  "4:LEN": {
    "1:VARINT": 4,
    "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/worker.py",
    "3:LEN": {
      "1:VARINT": 1533,
      "2:VARINT": 7414,
      "3:VARINT": 5881,
      "4:LEN": "async def _process_message(msg: BrokerMessage, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    fields = msg.fields\r\n    job_id = fields.get(\"job_id\")\r\n    if not job_id:\r\n        logger.error(\"Missing job_id in message\", extra={\"stream_id\": msg.entry_id})\r\n        await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    # Phase 1: transition QUEUED -> RUNNING and increment attempts\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.warning(\"Job not found; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if job.state in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED, JobState.DEAD}:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job already in terminal state; acking\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Idempotency: if job has already succeeded, do not re-run side effects.\r\n        if job.idempotency_key and job.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED:\r\n            logger.info(\"Idempotent re-delivery; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Only process QUEUED jobs here. If state changed unexpectedly, ack.\r\n        if job.state != JobState.QUEUED:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job not QUEUED; skipping\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        attempt = job.attempts + 1\r\n        job.attempts = attempt\r\n        try:\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"Worker starting execution\")\r\n        except InvalidStateTransition:\r\n            logger.exception(\"Invalid state transition to RUNNING\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n    # Phase 2: execute task outside transaction\r\n    job_type = fields.get(\"type\") or (job.type if \"job\" in locals() else \"unknown\")  # type: ignore[name-defined]\r\n    task_def = get_task_definition(job_type)\r\n\r\n    import time\r\n\r\n    start = time.monotonic()\r\n    JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type).inc()\r\n\r\n    async def check_canceled() -> None:\r\n        await _check_canceled(job_id)\r\n\r\n    # Reload job state for the context\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as exec_session:\r\n        job_for_ctx = await exec_session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n\r\n    ctx_logger = get_logger(f\"miniqueue.task.{task_def.name}\", service=\"worker\")\r\n    ctx = make_context(\r\n        job=job_for_ctx,  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n        attempt=attempt,\r\n        session=None,\r\n        logger=ctx_logger,\r\n        check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        payload = task_def.payload_model.model_validate(job_for_ctx.payload)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n        result = await task_def.func(ctx, payload)\r\n        exc: BaseException | None = None\r\n        canceled = False\r\n    except JobCanceled:\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = None\r\n        canceled = True\r\n    except BaseException as e:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = e\r\n        canceled = False\r\n\r\n    duration = time.monotonic() - start\r\n    JOB_DURATION_SECONDS.labels(type=job_type).observe(duration)\r\n\r\n    # Phase 3: final state transition + result persistence\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.error(\"Job disappeared before completion\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if canceled:\r\n            job.result = None\r\n            job.last_error = \"Canceled\"\r\n            job.cancel_requested = False\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.CANCELED, \"Job canceled cooperatively\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.CANCELED.value).inc()\r\n        elif exc is None:\r\n            job.result = result  # type: ignore[assignment]\r\n            job.last_error = None\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.SUCCEEDED, \"Job succeeded\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.SUCCEEDED.value).inc()\r\n        else:\r\n            # Failure path: decide between retry and DEAD\r\n            job.last_error = \"\".join(\r\n                traceback.format_exception_only(type(exc), exc)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n            ).strip()\r\n\r\n            if job.attempts >= job.max_attempts:\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.DEAD, \"Job reached max attempts\")\r\n                await push_dead_letter(\r\n                    {\r\n                        \"job_id\": job.id,\r\n                        \"type\": job.type,\r\n                        \"queue\": job.queue,\r\n                        \"error\": job.last_error or \"\",\r\n                    }\r\n                )\r\n                JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.DEAD.value).inc()\r\n            else:\r\n                delay = compute_backoff_seconds(\r\n                    job.attempts,\r\n                    base=settings.backoff_base_seconds,\r\n                    multiplier=settings.backoff_multiplier,\r\n                    cap=settings.backoff_cap_seconds,\r\n                )\r\n                job.next_run_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=delay)\r\n                job.is_enqueued = False\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job scheduled for retry\")\r\n\r\n    # Only XACK after DB commit succeeded.\r\n    await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n"
    },
    "4:VARINT": 9590
  }
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 02:50:06 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

```
{}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/worker.py", "3:VARINT": 4, "4:LEN": {"1:VARINT": 4, "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/worker.py", "3:LEN": {"1:VARINT": 1533, "2:VARINT": 7414, "3:VARINT": 5881, "4:LEN": "async def _process_message(msg: BrokerMessage, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    fields = msg.fields\r\n    job_id = fields.get(\"job_id\")\r\n    if not job_id:\r\n        logger.error(\"Missing job_id in message\", extra={\"stream_id\": msg.entry_id})\r\n        await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    # Phase 1: transition QUEUED -> RUNNING and increment attempts\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.warning(\"Job not found; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if job.state in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED, JobState.DEAD}:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job already in terminal state; acking\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Idempotency: if job has already succeeded, do not re-run side effects.\r\n        if job.idempotency_key and job.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED:\r\n            logger.info(\"Idempotent re-delivery; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Only process QUEUED jobs here. If state changed unexpectedly, ack.\r\n        if job.state != JobState.QUEUED:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job not QUEUED; skipping\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        attempt = job.attempts + 1\r\n        job.attempts = attempt\r\n        try:\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"Worker starting execution\")\r\n        except InvalidStateTransition:\r\n            logger.exception(\"Invalid state transition to RUNNING\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n    # Phase 2: execute task outside transaction\r\n    job_type = fields.get(\"type\") or (job.type if \"job\" in locals() else \"unknown\")  # type: ignore[name-defined]\r\n    task_def = get_task_definition(job_type)\r\n\r\n    import time\r\n\r\n    start = time.monotonic()\r\n    JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type).inc()\r\n\r\n    async def check_canceled() -> None:\r\n        await _check_canceled(job_id)\r\n\r\n    # Reload job state for the context\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as exec_session:\r\n        job_for_ctx = await exec_session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n\r\n    ctx_logger = get_logger(f\"miniqueue.task.{task_def.name}\", service=\"worker\")\r\n    ctx = make_context(\r\n        job=job_for_ctx,  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n        attempt=attempt,\r\n        session=None,\r\n        logger=ctx_logger,\r\n        check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        payload = task_def.payload_model.model_validate(job_for_ctx.payload)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n        result = await task_def.func(ctx, payload)\r\n        exc: BaseException | None = None\r\n        canceled = False\r\n    except JobCanceled:\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = None\r\n        canceled = True\r\n    except BaseException as e:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = e\r\n        canceled = False\r\n\r\n    duration = time.monotonic() - start\r\n    JOB_DURATION_SECONDS.labels(type=job_type).observe(duration)\r\n\r\n    # Phase 3: final state transition + result persistence\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.error(\"Job disappeared before completion\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if canceled:\r\n            job.result = None\r\n            job.last_error = \"Canceled\"\r\n            job.cancel_requested = False\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.CANCELED, \"Job canceled cooperatively\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.CANCELED.value).inc()\r\n        elif exc is None:\r\n            job.result = result  # type: ignore[assignment]\r\n            job.last_error = None\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.SUCCEEDED, \"Job succeeded\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.SUCCEEDED.value).inc()\r\n        else:\r\n            # Failure path: decide between retry and DEAD\r\n            job.last_error = \"\".join(\r\n                traceback.format_exception_only(type(exc), exc)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n            ).strip()\r\n\r\n            if job.attempts >= job.max_attempts:\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.DEAD, \"Job reached max attempts\")\r\n                await push_dead_letter(\r\n                    {\r\n                        \"job_id\": job.id,\r\n                        \"type\": job.type,\r\n                        \"queue\": job.queue,\r\n                        \"error\": job.last_error or \"\",\r\n                    }\r\n                )\r\n                JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.DEAD.value).inc()\r\n            else:\r\n                delay = compute_backoff_seconds(\r\n                    job.attempts,\r\n                    base=settings.backoff_base_seconds,\r\n                    multiplier=settings.backoff_multiplier,\r\n                    cap=settings.backoff_cap_seconds,\r\n                )\r\n                job.next_run_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=delay)\r\n                job.is_enqueued = False\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job scheduled for retry\")\r\n\r\n    # Only XACK after DB commit succeeded.\r\n    await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n"}, "4:VARINT": 9590}}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSSyncFile
```
